page_summary: PHILIP K DICK PAPERS Special Collections Special Collections Special Collections contains the library's rarest and most valuable original materials. Among these unique and varied collections are the Boswell Collection on the History of Cartography, the Frederick and Patricia Shroyer Science Fiction, Fantasy, and Horror collection, James Boyer May (Amsberry-May) papers. Our Science Fiction collections contain original manuscripts on Ray Bradbury, Philip K. Dick, and Frank Herbert's works, as well as on the original Star Trek series. .-4 It) r--l r-- N ~ It) e N It) C") ch ...J a.
